SEARCH
Package client.view

Class NotificationCenterController

java.lang.Object
client.view.BaseController
client.view.NotificationCenterController
public class NotificationCenterController extends BaseController
Notification center, reachable from the sidebar by any logged-in actor. On show it loads the actor's notifications via LIST_NOTIFICATIONS (the server derives the recipient from the session) and lists them newest-first, with unread messages highlighted and offering an Acknowledge action.

This is the offline-fetch half of the feature: a notification sent while the actor was offline waits in the table and shows up here on next login; a notification sent while they are online also arrives as an instant popup (wired in MainShellController). Acknowledge sends ACK_NOTIFICATION and, on success, reloads so the row drops out of the unread set.

Extends BaseController for navigation-lifecycle parity. It holds no push subscription of its own — the shell owns the session-lifetime subscription to ("notification", actorId), so this screen must not SUBSCRIBE/UNSUBSCRIBE that key (a per-screen UNSUBSCRIBE on hide would tear down the shell's popup feed, since the server tracks subscriptions per connection, not per callback).

      public NotificationCenterController(NetworkService network, Session session)
      Creates the notification-center controller.
      Parameters:
      network - the shared network service
      session - the current client session

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      private void initialize()
      FXML lifecycle hook: loads the actor's notifications.

      Refresh-button handler: reloads the notifications.

      private void load()
      Loads the actor's notifications from the server and repaints the list.

    • populate

      private void populate(List<NotificationDTO> rows)
      Renders the header and one row per notification (or an empty-state row).
      Parameters:
      rows - the notifications to display, newest first

    • dataRow

      private HBox dataRow(NotificationDTO n, boolean withDivider)
      Builds one notification row (with an Acknowledge action when unread).
      Parameters:
      n - the notification to render
      withDivider - whether to draw a divider below the row
      Returns:
      the assembled row

    • acknowledge

      private void acknowledge(int notificationId)
      Acknowledges one notification, then reloads on success so it clears unread.
      Parameters:
      notificationId - the notification to acknowledge

    • when

      private static String when(NotificationDTO n)
      Prefers the delivery time, falling back to creation time; "" if neither is set.
      Parameters:
      n - the notification
      Returns:
      the best available timestamp, or ""
